attacking_style: Does not attack personally. Career has transitioned to pure domestique role, focused on tempo control and setting up teammates rather than personal results.
team_tactics: Jumbo-Visma deploys Gesink as high-tempo pacesetter on climbs to neutralize early attacks and control GC threats. Functions as trusted lieutenant allowing GC leaders to conserve energy.
terrain_preference: Long, steady climbs where sustained tempo riding at 40kph+ can discourage aggressive racing. Not exposed on any specific terrain as domestique role is defensive.
vulnerability: At 36+ years old, lacks personal attacking punch. Entirely dependent on team context for any individual recognition. Cannot respond to explosive accelerations.
key_patterns: Deployed as high-tempo pacesetter to neutralize attacks, maintaining 40kph averages (2 instances)
Team deliberately grants ceremonial honors (TTT line crossing) despite GC domestique status (2 instances)
Consistent GC support role controlling specific threats like Valverde (2 instances)
form_trajectory: neutral: Still trusted for critical tempo management at 36, suggesting maintained fitness, but purely in domestique capacity with no personal ambitions
